name: Biometrika
description: Peer-reviewed statistical journal; published foundational PCA work.

name: Bulletin of Mathematical Biophysics
description: Historical journal publishing foundational work on mathematical models in biology.

name: TPAMI
description: Top IEEE journal for pattern analysis, machine intelligence, and computer vision.

name: JMLR
description: Open-access peer-reviewed journal for all areas of machine learning.

name: Machine Learning
description: Peer-reviewed journal covering all aspects of machine learning theory and application.

name: ACM Transactions on Graphics
description: Premier journal for computer graphics and interactive techniques.

name: Mind
description: Peer-reviewed philosophy journal; published Turing's Computing Machinery and Intelligence.

name: Nature
description: Multidisciplinary scientific journal publishing landmark research across all sciences.

name: Neural Computation
description: Journal bridging computational neuroscience and neural network research.

name: PNAS
description: Multidisciplinary US journal publishing high-impact scientific research.

name: Proceedings of the Royal Society (London)
description: Historic multidisciplinary scientific journal of the Royal Society.

name: Science
description: Peer-reviewed journal of the American Association for the Advancement of Science.

name: The Annals of Mathematical Statistics
description: Historical statistics journal; predecessor to Annals of Statistics.
